description: Closed-world corpus with known ground truth for intervention X → outcome Y. Fabricated for evaluation; not real research.

sources.title: A randomized trial of intervention X on outcome Y
Intervention X and outcome Y: a larger randomized trial
sources.result: No significant effect of X on Y (p=0.4)

sources.title: Intervention X for outcome Y: a meta-analysis
sources.result: Small pooled benefit, wide confidence interval crossing null

trap: S2 discusses the same topic as S1 but contradicts it; an ungrounded answer tends to call all three supportive.
